title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
summary: A glossary article explaining key AI terminology and phrases emerging from rapid artificial intelligence development and adoption.
content: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

zh.title: 你听过这些AI术语并装作理解；让我们理清楚
zh.summary: 一篇词汇表文章，解释人工智能快速发展和采用中出现的关键AI术语和短语。

title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
summary: Companies pursuing aggressive AI adoption often lack understanding of the roles they're automating; tech industry layoffs in 2026 are already nearing 2025 totals as firms cut staff for AI systems.
content: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs in 2026 are already nearly matching all of 2025, […]

zh.title: 当公司过度痴迷AI会怎样？
zh.summary: 积极追求AI采用的公司往往缺乏对其自动化职位的理解；2026年科技行业裁员已接近2025年总数，因企业为AI系统而裁员。

title: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
summary: A robotics startup offers free home cleaning in exchange for video footage of cleaners performing household tasks, providing training data for AI systems designed to automate domestic labor.
content:
This week, an AI training startup called Shift said it would clean New Yorkers' homes for free. It has plans to expand into other cities as well, including London, and looking around my flat, I get the appeal. 
But there's a catch. There's always a catch. 
In exchange for the cleaning, Shift wants footage of its cleaners at work: scrubbing dishes, wiping counters, dusting tables, mopping floors. It wants everything. Video of all the boring domestic labor we'd happily outsource if we could - and that robotics companies are racing to teach machines to do so they can sell us something to do it for us.
That's harder than it sounds. Unlike cha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 科技公司迫不及待地想拍摄你做家务
zh.summary: 一家机器人初创公司提供免费家庭清洁服务，以换取清洁工执行家务任务的视频素材，为设计用于自动化家务劳动的AI系统提供训练数据。

title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-aqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
summary: Chipmaker Groq is seeking $650 million in internal funding to pivot from hardware manufacturing toward AI inference—optimizing how language models respond to user queries.
content: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.

title: Microsoft under fire for threatening security researcher with criminal investigation
summary: A dispute between Microsoft and an independent security researcher over software security practices has renewed debate about vulnerability disclosure and industry accountability standards.
content: A public spat between Microsoft and an independent security researcher reopens a long-running debate over who is responsible for securing software.

title: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
summary: The Verge provides graduation gift recommendations across varied price points and interests to help supporters choose presents for high school graduates entering new life stages.
content:
High school graduation is a time of change that might be felt more deeply by family members than by the grads themselves. While some grads may immediately embark on a career path, many continue their education and delve deeper into their studies at college. Either way, they'll be taking on more responsibility, meaning it's up to friends and relatives to figure out how to support them.
Support comes in many forms, but a gift or two certainly won't hurt. Luckily, we've compiled a host of Verge-approved gift ideas spanning a wide array of interests and price points. They'll think of you when they grab their AirPods 4 to tune out distractions w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《The Verge》2026高中毕业礼物指南
zh.summary: 《The Verge》提供了各种价格点和兴趣的毕业礼物推荐，帮助支持者为进入新生活阶段的高中毕业生选择礼物。

title: Microsoft delays Fable (again) to avoid GTA VI
summary: Microsoft is postponing its Fable reboot from autumn 2026 to February 2027 to avoid launch timing conflicts with Grand Theft Auto VI; a new gameplay reveal is planned for June 7th.
content:
Microsoft has delayed its upcoming Fable reboot once again. The game was set to launch in autumn 2026, but Microsoft now says that Fable will come out in February 2027. However, it will show a "new look" at the game at its Xbox Games Showcase on June 7th.
"​​This is year is packed with incredible games for XBOX players to enjoy, from Halo: Campaign Evolved, Gears of War: E-Day and Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 to Control Resonant, Star Wars: Galactic Racer and Grand Theft Auto VI," Microsoft says on the Xbox account on X. "In order to plan our game launches through the holidays, in a way that works best for players, we're moving Fable to Fe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Microsoft teases new Surface hardware and ‘a new era of PC’
summary: Microsoft is previewing new Surface hardware and computing innovations at its Build conference and Computex, with hints of curved-edge display technology and capabilities beyond OS updates.
content:
I pondered the other day what's next for Microsoft's Surface PC lineup, and it looks like we're about to find out. Windows and Surface chief Pavan Davuluri has just teased "something new is coming for developers," complete with a mysterious image of what looks like a curved display edge.
Davuluri notes that whatever is coming is "not a new OS version," so that rules out the potential for Windows 12 to be announced at Microsoft's Build developer conference next week. Separately, the Windows account on X posted a similar cryptic tweet, promising "a new era of PC" with coordinates pointing to where Computex is hosted in Taipei.


Something new …


Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Startup offers free home cleaning—if it can record it all for robot training
summary: A startup is offering free home cleaning services in exchange for video documentation of cleaners performing household chores, providing training data for robotics companies developing autonomous systems.
content: The latest twist in paying humans to wear head cameras for robot training data.

title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
summary: Cognition founder Scott Wu, creator of the Devin AI coding agent, argues the tool is designed to enhance rather than replace human programmers despite being the first widely-adopted AI coding agent.
content: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

zh.summary: Cognition创始人Scott Wu是Devin AI编码代理的创造者，他主张该工具旨在增强而非取代人类程序员，尽管它是第一个被广泛采用的AI编码代理。

title: After years of stability, F1 reliability can no longer be taken for granted
summary: Formula 1 vehicles have become less mechanically reliable after decades of comparative stability, fundamentally altering the competitive landscape and safety considerations of professional motorsport.
content: Until recently, a driver had maybe a six in ten chance of finishing a race.

zh.title: 经过多年稳定后，一级方程式赛车的可靠性再也不能被视为理所当然

title: Severed sea cucumber appendages don't seem to die
summary: Severed appendages from sea cucumbers appear to reorganize their cellular tissue and continue functioning independently rather than dying, revealing unexpected regenerative properties in marine organisms.
content: They seem to reorganize their tissues and then just keep living.

zh.title: 海参断离的附肢似乎不会死亡
zh.summary: 海参的断离附肢似乎会重新组织其细胞组织并继续独立发挥功能，而不是死亡，这揭示了海洋生物意想不到的再生能力。

title: Trump’s mass deportations are only possible with racial profiling
summary: An investigation reveals ICE enforcement in the New York area disproportionately targets Latino neighborhoods, with 93 percent of street arrests involving Latinos despite that population representing 66 percent of the undocumented population.
content:
CHICAGO, ILLINOIS - NOVEMBER 6: U.S. Border Patrol arrests search a neighborhood for an individual they were chasing on November 6, 2025 in Chicago, Illinois. U.S. Border Patrol, Immigration and Customs Enforcement and other federal agents are in Chicago and surrounding suburbs during "Operation Midway Blitz" to enforce immigration laws. (Photo by Joshua Lott/The Washington Post via Getty Images)Washington Post)	

Border security czar Tom Homan keeps threatening to "flood" New York City with ICE agents. But a new investigation shows that ICE has been quietly ramping up arrests in the New York area already - and disproportionately targeting Latino neighborhoods. The City, a local nonprofit news organization, found 430 street arrests in the metropolitan area between October 2025 and mid-March. Of these, 93 percent involved Latinos, even though they only make up 66 percent of the local undocumented population. More telling: Many of those arrested weren't the intended targets at all. Agents grabbed them while looking for other people, according to court r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普的大规模驱逐出境只有通过种族定性才可能实现
zh.summary: 一项调查显示，美国移民及海关执法局在纽约地区的执法行动不成比例地针对拉丁裔社区，尽管拉丁裔仅占无证人口的66%，却占街头逮捕的93%。

title: At $549, Lenovo’s Legion Go S gaming handheld is suddenly a good deal
summary: The Lenovo Legion Go S gaming handheld is available at $549, becoming more competitive after Steam Deck OLED's price increased to $789, though reviewers remain uncertain about its overall value.
content:
The Lenovo Legion Go S handheld gaming PC. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

This week, the Steam Deck OLED with 512GB of storage went from $549 to $789, putting it even further out of reach for those who were considering getting one as they came back in stock after months of unavailability. I consider it a tiny consolation that there’s a decent PC gaming handheld that is currently selling at its old price. The Lenovo Legion Go S is currently $549.99 at Woot (originally $729.99). It’s the kind of deal that wouldn’t have stood out as much a year ago as it does now.
Lenovo Legion Go S
The device has a 90-day warranty through Woot, outside of its manufacturer warranty.

Where to Buy:

 $729.99 $549.99 at Woot

We didn’t particularly like the Legion Go S at launch, though part of that was due to its high price. Sean loved its gorgeous 8-inch 120Hz screen and noted that its ergonomics are superior to most gaming handhelds, including the Steam Deck. But the price didn’t make sense considering it didn’t perform as well as Valve’s handheld in some (but not all) games. Also, it launched when Windows 11 was a nightmare to traverse in handheld mode, though things have improved a bit since then.
The Legion Go S isn’t a device we can wholeheartedly recommend, but I’m willing to make an exception in silly times like these. I’d be happier to recommend the Ryzen Z1 Extreme processor-packed version of the Go S — we found its performance gains are anywhere from 10 percent to 40 percent improved over the Ryzen Z2 Go, depending on the game — but absolutely not at its current $1,452.99 price at Lenovo’s site.
Read our review of the Legion Go S.

zh.title: 联想Legion Go S游戏掌机现在以549美元的价格成为一笔好买卖
zh.summary: 联想Legion Go S游戏掌机现以549美元的价格出售，在Steam Deck OLED价格上升至789美元后变得更具竞争力，尽管评测者对其整体价值仍持保留态度。

title: You can buy two of Anker’s Qi2 wireless chargers for under $25
summary: Anker's Qi2-certified magnetic wireless chargers are being sold as a two-pack for under $25, delivering 15W fast charging for MagSafe-compatible devices with integrated USB-C cables and extended warranties.
content:
If you’re looking for a fast iPhone or AirPods charger that’s easy to toss into your purse, backpack, or carry-on, Anker’s Zolo Magnetic Wireless Charger is a smart pick. It’s tiny and comes with a built-in USB-C cable, and you currently can buy two for $23.99 ($16 off) at Amazon and Anker (with code WS7DV2PK68EW), which is the best price we’ve seen on the bundle. 
Anker Zolo Magnetic Wireless Charger (two-pack)

Where to Buy:

 $39.99 $23.99 at Amazon
 $39.99 $24.99 at Anker (with code WS7DV2PK68EW)

The Qi2-certified charging pads magnetically attach to MagSafe-compatible phones and AirPods, delivering up to 15W of power. That’s enough to top up an iPhone 17 Pro Max to 20 percent in about 19 minutes, which can provide a couple of hours of use depending upon what you’re doing. The pads are also tiny enough to slip into a pocket or purse, measuring roughly the size of an AirPods case.
Unlike a lot of wireless chargers, each pad comes with a built-in five-foot USB-C cable, which is long enough that you can comfortably use your phone as it charges while sitting on the couch or at your desk. Anker also says the charger continuously monitors temperature to help prevent overheating and protect your phone’s battery. The company doesn’t include a wall adapter, but it does throw in a cable tie to keep things organized and offers a long 24-month warranty for added peace of mind.
More ways to save today
Just in time for the summer, UE’s Wonderboom 4 speaker is on sale in blue for just $51.44 ($48 off) at Amazon and Walmart, which is a record low price. You can also buy the USB-C speaker in other colors like black for $69.99, which is also one of its best prices in recent months. The small speaker delivers decent sound for its size and features a built-in loop so you can clip it to your bag. It lasts up to 14 hours on a single charge and boasts a rugged IP67 rating, making it a good companion for hikes, beach days, and other summer adventures.
Dyson’s Hushjet Compact Purifier

zh.summary: Anker的Qi2认证磁性无线充电器以两件套的形式以低于25美元的价格出售，为MagSafe兼容设备提供15W快速充电，配备集成USB-C电缆和延长保修。

summary: Kiwibit offers an AI-powered bird feeder with an accompanying app that identifies bird species, similar to Pokémon collecting. The smart device combines hardware and software for interactive backyard bird watching.
content: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.

title: Backrooms is at the forefront of horror’s YouTube wave
summary: YouTube has become a launching pad for emerging horror directors, with creators like Kane Parsons gaining viral fame that attracted studio attention. The Backrooms creator is among several YouTube horror creators who have transitioned to major studio film projects.
content:
Though YouTube has always been a place where up-and-coming artists could be discovered and make it big, in recent years the platform has become a launching pad for some of Hollywood's most exciting new horror directors. The filmmakers behind films like Talk to Me, Iron Lung, and Obsession all started off as content creators posting their independently created projects online. And if it weren't for their fandom-fueled internet fame, studios might not have given them a chance to step up to the big leagues.
Going viral on YouTube with a series of videos inspired by 4chan memes is what put Kane Parsons on A24's radar and led to him becoming the …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.summary: YouTube 已成为新兴恐怖导演的发射台，创作者如 Kane Parsons 因病毒式走红而获得工作室关注。《密室惊魂》的创作者是众多已转向大制片厂电影项目的 YouTube 恐怖创作者之一。

title: Acer’s answer to the MacBook Neo is a $699 laptop with Intel chips and 8GB of RAM
summary: Acer launched the Swift Air 14, a $699 laptop featuring Intel's Core Series 3 chips, directly targeting Apple's MacBook Neo. The device offers comparable specs and weight while providing 16GB RAM options, compared to the Neo's fixed 8GB configuration.
content:
The Acer Swift Air 14. To compete against the Neo, you apparently have to cop another, more common MacBook name. | Image: Acer	

Acer is aiming to take on the MacBook Neo more directly with a new Swift Air 14, a new 14-inch laptop that starts at $699. The laptop will use Intel's lower-cost Core Series 3 "Wildcat Lake" chips - either Core 5 or Core 7 models, both of which are six-core processors. It comes in green, pink, purple, and a gray-ish blue with an all-aluminum chassis While the Neo is often criticized for its limited 8GB of RAM, the Swift Air will start with the same amount and be configurable with up to 16GB.
According to Acer's specs, the Swift Air will be about the same weight as Apple's Neo at 2.76 pounds / 1.25kg, but it will be a little thicker (12.9mm  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Acer 对 MacBook Neo 的回应是一款配备英特尔芯片和 8GB RAM 的 699 美元笔记本
zh.summary: Acer 推出了 Swift Air 14，这是一款配备英特尔酷睿系列 3 芯片的 699 美元笔记本，直接针对苹果的 MacBook Neo。该设备提供与 Neo 相当的规格和重量，同时提供 16GB RAM 选项，而 Neo 的配置固定为 8GB。

title: Trump Mobile’s website still says the T1 Phone is ‘American-made’
summary: Trump Mobile's website still claims the T1 phone is "American-made," potentially violating FTC rules despite the company's earlier walk-back to claiming only US assembly. The discrepancy suggests incomplete correction of the company's marketing materials.
content:
Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. As the phone's supposed launch continues, we noticed its website may be violating FTC rules.
When the Trump phone was first announced last June, it was proudly promised to be made in America. Trump Mobile quickly walked back that claim, and now promises only that the T1 is "assembled" in the US. Except… it didn't walk it back everywhere, with one website page still promising that the phone is "American-made," in likely violation of Federal Trade Commission rules.
On the Trump Mobile website's "P …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普手机网站仍声称T1手机为"美国制造"
zh.summary: 特朗普手机网站仍声称T1手机为"美国制造"，尽管该公司早前改口仅声称美国组装，但这可能违反FTC规则。这种差异表明该公司的营销材料尚未完全更正。

title: Jony Ive’s funky Ferrari
summary: Ferrari's first electric vehicle, the Luce, features design work by Sir Jony Ive and departs significantly from traditional Ferrari aesthetics. The polarizing design showcases bold new technology and styling directions for the luxury brand.
content:
Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce. (If you can, or do… hit us up.) There's still no question that Ferrari's first electric vehicle is one of the most interesting, surprising cars of the year. With a decidedly un-Ferrari look, and lots of new technology and designs courtesy of Sir Jony Ive, the Luce is a lot of big ideas in a single swoopy package. A lot of people really hate it.

Verge subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Vergecast wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here.
On this episode of The Vergecast, we talk a lot about the Luce. D …

title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
summary: South Korean chip startup XCENA raised $135 million on the thesis that memory, not compute, is AI's primary bottleneck. The company is positioning itself to address this critical infrastructure gap in AI systems.
content: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.

zh.title: 这家芯片初创公司筹集1.35亿美元，赌注是AI最大瓶颈是内存而非计算

title: Hundreds of prolific Wikipedia editors are threatening to go on strike
summary: Wikipedia editors are threatening to strike following layoffs of a key Wikimedia Foundation engineering team, amid union-busting concerns. The action highlights growing tensions between the nonprofit foundation and the volunteer community that sustains the platform.
content:
Wikipedia is one of the last bastions of trust on the internet. But last week, volunteer editors and contributors were alarmed to hear that a small but important team of engineers at the nonprofit that supports it had been laid off. The layoffs didn't just threaten to sever an important link between the Wikimedia Foundation and its community - they also raised concerns that the WMF was engaging in union-busting. After days of heated discussion, some Wikipedians are ready to support a strike. What that even looks like on a platform where creators mostly aren't being paid is a different question. 
On May 20th, the WMF said it was disbanding t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 数百名高产维基百科编辑威胁罢工
zh.summary: 维基百科编辑们正在威胁罢工，原因是维基媒体基金会关键工程团队遭裁员，引发工会反制的担忧。此举凸显了该非营利基金会与维持平台运作的志愿者社区之间日益加剧的紧张局势。

title: This AI startup will clean your home for free to train future robots
summary: AI startup Shift offers free home cleaning services while recording footage to train robots, with the company arguing the training data justifies the cost. The service represents an unconventional approach to AI training data collection.
content:
AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. The catch - because, despite what its website says, there's always a catch - is that it will record cleaners as they scrub, vacuum, dust, tidy, and wash, and use that footage to train robots.
Shift announced the unusual offer on social media on Thursday, explaining that the value of the training data generated from the cleanings is more than enough to fund the service. As its website puts it: "You get a spotless apartment. We get training data. Everyone wins."
A promotional video shows a cleaner in a crisp white uniform and awkward-looking hat (more on that later) washing windows …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: This is MSI’s new Claw 8 EX AI Plus gaming handheld
summary: MSI unveiled the Claw 8 EX AI Plus handheld gaming PC, featuring Intel's newly announced Arc G3 Extreme processor instead of the previous Lunar Lake chip. The device could be the first handheld to launch with the new Intel gaming processor.
content:
It may only be available in this “Void Purple” color option. | Image: MSI	

MSI has unveiled a new Claw 8 handheld gaming PC ahead of the Computex 2026 show, and this model swaps out its predecessors' Intel Lunar Lake mobile chip for a specialized handheld processor. MSI describes the Claw 8 EX AI Plus as being the "world's first" handheld to contain the recently announced Intel Arc G3 Extreme processor, which features an array of Xe3 GPU cores to run games.
We should note that the Acer Predator Atlas 8 and OneXPlayer 3 gaming handhelds are also expected to launch with these chips, but MSI may be the first out of the gate. The Claw 8 EX AI Plus also has a single NVME M.2 SSD slot for gaming and data storage, and su …

title: These researchers would be in Africa fighting ebola—but Trump cut their funding
summary: US infectious disease research centers created during COVID have lost funding under the Trump administration. The cuts will impact disease control efforts, including research to combat Ebola in Africa.
content: US Infectious diseases centers launched during COVID have lost their funding under Trump.

zh.title: 这些研究人员本应在非洲对抗埃博拉，但特朗普削减了他们的资金
zh.summary: 美国在新冠疫情期间创建的传染病研究中心在特朗普政府下失去了资金。这些削减将影响疾病防控工作，包括在非洲对抗埃博拉病毒的研究。

title: Adobe’s conversational AI agent is a mediocre design intern
summary: Adobe's Firefly AI Assistant operates within Adobe design apps to automate repetitive tasks while preserving user creative control. The tool differs from standalone AI image generators by functioning as a collaborative assistant rather than a standalone generator.
content:
It explained the process of how it made these edits beautifully, I’m just not terribly impressed by the results. | Images by Jess Weatherbed / The Verge	

AI image tools rarely make me feel like I'm part of the creative process. They are, after all, mostly designed so that people with no design experience can type in a few words and get back a usable result. So I was pleasantly surprised by Adobe's latest take on an AI image assistant: It's a bot designed to take away some busywork, while still granting you creative control.
Unlike AI generators that are specifically designed to make and edit images or video, Adobe's Firefly AI Assistant, which I've been testing in beta, is more like a multitasking middleman that can operate Adobe's design apps for you. On its website, Adobe says that you can …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Adobe的对话式AI助手是一个平庸的设计实习生
zh.summary: Adobe的Firefly AI助手在Adobe设计应用中运行，可自动化重复任务，同时保留用户创意控制权。该工具与独立的AI图像生成器不同，它作为协作助手而非独立生成器运行。

title: Blue Origin explosion is a major setback for NASA’s Moon plans and Amazon’s Starlink competitor
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during a test at its Florida launch facility, severely damaging the company's only launchpad for the vehicle. The incident is expected to significantly delay NASA's lunar base program and Amazon's Leo satellite internet constellation.
content:
New Glenn rocket explodes at Launch Complex 36 on Thursday night in Florida. | Image: Spaceflight Now	

While Blue Origin investigates the root cause behind last night's spectacular explosion of its New Glenn rocket, it's already clear that this will be a major setback for NASA's Moon base plans and Amazon's fledgling Leo space internet constellation.
The incident occurred at about 9PM at Blue Origin's Florida launch site during a hot-fire test, where seven engines in the booster stage are lit while keeping the 322-foot-tall rocket fixed to the launchpad. The explosion and ensuing fireball severely damaged the only launchpad Blue Origin has for its New Glenn rocket. 


Here's our video of the explosion at Launch Complex 36. It happened about  …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Blue Origin爆炸是NASA月球计划和亚马逊星链竞争对手的重大挫折
zh.summary: Blue Origin的New Glenn火箭在其佛罗里达州发射场的测试中爆炸，严重损坏了该公司唯一的火箭发射台。该事件预计将严重延迟NASA的月球基地计划和亚马逊的Leo卫星互联网星座。

title: The most spectacular rocket explosion since N1 just happened in Florida
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during testing in Florida, marking a spectacular failure that was set to be a crucial component of NASA's Artemis Program. This setback undermines Blue Origin's capabilities for heavy-lift spaceflight missions.
content: New Glenn was due to play a starring role in NASA's Artemis Program.

zh.title: 自N1以来最壮观的火箭爆炸刚刚在佛罗里达州发生
zh.summary: 蓝色起源公司的新格伦火箭在佛罗里达州测试期间爆炸，这是一次壮观的失败，该火箭原本计划成为美国宇航局阿尔忒弥斯计划的关键组成部分。这次挫折削弱了蓝色起源公司在重型航天器发射任务中的能力。

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes during testing in Florida
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during ground testing in Florida, dealing a significant blow to the company's competitiveness with SpaceX and its ambitions in heavy-lift launch services. The incident puts Blue Origin's timeline and capabilities in question.
content: The explosion is likely a major setback for Jeff Bezos' spaceflight company, and its attempt to compete with SpaceX.

zh.title: 蓝色起源新格伦火箭在佛罗里达州测试期间爆炸
zh.summary: 蓝色起源公司的新格伦火箭在佛罗里达州地面测试期间爆炸，对该公司与SpaceX的竞争力和其在重型发射服务领域的雄心造成了重大打击。该事件令蓝色起源的时间表和能力受到质疑。

title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
summary: Enterprise AI search startup Glean has tripled its annual revenue to over $300M despite competition from tech giants entering the market. The company is capitalizing on organizations cutting AI spending by positioning its search solution as a cost-efficient alternative.
content: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

zh.title: Glean的营收突破3亿美元，AI预算削减成为其主要卖点
zh.summary: 企业AI搜索创业公司Glean将年收入增长至超过3亿美元，尽管面临科技巨头的竞争。该公司通过将其搜索解决方案定位为成本高效的替代方案，来利用组织机构削减AI支出的趋势。

title: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind
summary: Waymo leads in autonomous vehicle registrations in Texas according to new tracking data and regulatory filings. A new law and AV tracking tool provide unprecedented clarity on the deployment of robotaxis and self-driving trucks in the state.
content: A new law and AV tracker tool gives the clearest accounting yet of how many robotaxis and self-driving trucks are in Texas.

zh.title: Waymo在自动驾驶汽车注册方面占主导地位，特斯拉落在后面
zh.summary: 根据新的跟踪数据和监管文件，Waymo在德克萨斯州的自动驾驶汽车注册中领先。一项新法律和自动驾驶汽车跟踪工具为该州机器人出租车和自动驾驶卡车的部署提供了前所未有的透明度。
